name: appliohq
description: Applio (appliohq.com) — static front-end (GitHub Pages) + Cloudflare Worker API (in ./worker).

scripts.deploy:staging: cd worker && npx wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.dev:staging: cd worker && npx wrangler dev --env staging
scripts.secrets:list: cd worker && npx wrangler secret list
scripts.predeploy: echo '>> Deploying PRODUCTION worker from ./worker (KV 84f236c3). Ctrl-C to abort.' && sleep 3
